name: The Ultimate Chocolate Chip Cookie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Line a baking sheet with foil.
3. In a large bowl, beat together the shortening, brown sugar, milk, and vanilla extract until well blended.
4. Add the egg and beat until well combined.
5. Stir in the flour, salt, and baking soda.
6. Mix in the chocolate chips.
7. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough about 3 inches apart onto the prepared cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 8-10 minutes for chewy cookies or 11-13 minutes for crisp cookies.
9. Allow cooling for 2 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
10. This recipe makes about 3 dozen cookies.
